# GitHub Configuration Files

This directory contains GitHub-specific configuration and internal reference files.

## 📁 Directory Structure

```
.github/
├── ISSUE_TEMPLATE/
│   ├── bug_report.md           # Bug report template
│   └── feature_request.md      # Feature request template
├── PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md    # Pull request template
├── REPO_INFO.md                # Repository description & social media content (internal)
├── CHECKLIST.md                # Open source launch checklist (internal)
└── README.md                   # This file
```

## 📝 File Descriptions

### Issue Templates

- **bug_report.md**: Template for users to report bugs
- **feature_request.md**: Template for users to suggest new features

### Pull Request Template

- **PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md**: Template for contributors to submit PRs

### Internal Reference Files

- **REPO_INFO.md**: Repository metadata, descriptions, tags, and social media content for launch
- **CHECKLIST.md**: Comprehensive checklist for open source launch preparation

## 🔒 Note

Files marked as "internal" are for project maintainers' reference and can be removed after the project is published.
